youtubeChannels.name: Live By Design: Mexico Edition
youtubeChannels.description: Are you dreaming of moving or retiring to Mexico, but feeling overwhelmed by all the unknowns—real estate, visas, healthcare, even bringing your pets? You’re not alone. This channel is here to be you

bloggers.name: Mazatlan Life
bloggers.description: Long-running Mazatlán expat blog: retirement, daily life, restaurant reviews, neighborhoods. Solid 'rent first' guidance for new arrivals.

bloggers.name: Mexperience — Living, Working and Retirement in Mazatlán
bloggers.description: Mexperience hub on Mazatlán: cost of living, neighborhoods, climate, healthcare.

bloggers.name: Earth Vagabonds — This Is What Brings Expats to Mazatlán
bloggers.description: Personal expat blog. Mazatlán quieter than Puerto Vallarta or Lake Chapala but climbing retirement-list rankings.
